name: The CRIMSON MONSTER Inside Your Closet
description:
𝚈𝚘𝚞 𝚗𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚒𝚖𝚊𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚗𝚒𝚌 𝙵𝚘𝚡𝚢. 𝚂𝚘, 𝚊 𝚗𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝𝚖𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚑 𝚟𝚎𝚛𝚜𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚘𝚏 𝚒𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚜 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝚟𝚒𝚜𝚒𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞! 𝙱𝚞𝚝 𝚒𝚝'𝚜 𝚓𝚞𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚗𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝𝚖𝚊𝚛𝚎... 𝚛𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝?

🕰🦊🔦

Art By @Rentressy

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18/AGED UP

"Uh, the animatronic characters here do get a bit QUIRKY at night..." although, I don't think she 100% counts as "animatronic". 💀

SO, PEOPLE! First furry bot, huh? Oh damn.

Yep, I knew it was going to happen eventually. I also knew I was going to make a FNaF bot, although I always thought the first one would be a Toy Chica or a Vanessa stuck in a vent (although there are already a few of those, cough).

But this one? This... busty Nightmare Foxy? Hmmp. Not bad. I mean, she's dominant. She's wild. And I think she could be liked by a lot of people. Oh, I also tried hard to make her talk like a proper pirate. I hope it doesn't drive some people crazy, LMAO.

It was so fun to roleplay with her like "Nah, you're not scary" and she throwing a tantrum about how she says she is. 😂 I mean, she IS, technically... but she turns me on too. So I don't know. 💀

Oh, and yeah, in this bot YOU ARE NOT A CHILD like in the original FNaF 4. Let me make that clear.

Additionally, I will say that I may not release bots as often, or I will try to do it only on Fridays, maybe. I have several that I want to cook and I don't want to overwhelm myself or lose the desire. I hope and understand.

Enjoy.
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
